purpose: Reusable engineering-estimator PBQ checklist for water infrastructure tenders. This playbook is non-project-specific and is intended to generate detailed clause-level, drawing-level, BOQ-level, and design-basis pre-bid queries in addition to strategic risk PBQs.
core_principle: For every detected scope element, ask what information a bidder needs to price, design, procure, construct, test, commission, operate, and legally accept that element. If required information is missing, unclear, inconsistent, not linked to BOQ/payment, or only available as non-editable drawings, raise a PBQ row.

generation_mode.name: engineering_detail_coverage
generation_mode.instruction: Do not limit output to top risks. Generate all practical engineering, BOQ, drawing, design, site, utility, O&M, and interface clarification queries that are required for complete pricing and execution coverage.

query_style.tone: Practical bidder query register wording, not narrative tender analysis.
preferred_openings: Please include the same in BOQ...
Please provide the editable AutoCAD/DWG file...
required_traits: Ask one concrete question per row.
Reference the exact clause, page, drawing, schedule, BOQ item, or section when available.
Mention the exact missing detail or inconsistency.
State why the answer is needed for pricing, design, procurement, construction, O&M, schedule, responsibility, or compliance.
Use '-' where the reference is not available instead of inventing.
avoid: High-level risk summaries without a requested employer action.
Merging separate engineering details only because they belong to the same broad scope.
Assuming dimensions, thickness, lengths, ratings, quantities, or responsibilities not stated in evidence.

coverage_rules: Run this playbook after or alongside deep risk PBQ generation.
Do not cap rows based on elegance or brevity; coverage is more important than small row count.
Deduplicate only when the exact missing data and exact employer action are materially the same.
Keep separate rows for separate drawings, BOQ items, structures, pipelines, equipment groups, power interfaces, SCADA interfaces, O&M responsibilities, or payment mechanisms.
A valid row can be based on absence after search if the scope element is detected and the missing data is normally required for pricing/design/execution.
If evidence is indirect, mark evidence strength as absence_after_search or inferred rather than dropping the query.
When a drawing/specification references another annexure, DPR, schedule, GAD, calculation, list, or report that is not found, raise a missing-reference PBQ.

pbq_triggers: PDF drawing available but editable DWG not provided
drawing references DPR/annexure/schedule not found in uploaded tender set
drawing title/revision/sheet number conflicts with tender reference
drawing shows scope item but BOQ/payment item is not clear
layout exists but dimensions/elevations/coordinates are missing or unreadable
query_templates: Please provide editable AutoCAD/DWG files for the tender drawings to enable accurate quantity take-off and design coordination.
Please provide the referenced DPR/annexure/schedule, as it is required to understand the design basis and price the scope.
Please confirm the applicable latest revision of the drawing and whether bidders should follow the drawing or the tender specification in case of conflict.
Please confirm the BOQ item/payment mechanism for the scope shown in the drawing.

pbq_triggers: pipe diameter shown but thickness/class missing
route length or chainage differs across drawings/specifications/BOQ
pipe material or coating/lining not specified
crossing method or responsibility not specified
pipeline appurtenance shown in drawings but BOQ item unclear
hydraulic or surge basis not provided for pipe sizing
query_templates: Please provide the pipe wall thickness/pressure class and material grade for the specified pipeline section, as it is required for quantity take-off, procurement, and pricing.
Please confirm the final pipeline length/chainage to be considered for bidding where the drawings and BOQ/specification differ.
Please provide coating, lining, jointing, bedding, backfilling, and testing requirements for the pipeline section.
Please confirm whether crossings, valves, chambers, thrust blocks, and appurtenances shown along the pipeline are included in the quoted BOQ items or payable separately.

disciplines.discipline: Valves, Chambers, Thrust Blocks, and Appurtenances
pbq_triggers: valves or chambers shown in drawings but quantities/locations not tabulated
valve rating/MOC/actuation not specified
chamber dimensions/reinforcement details missing
thrust/anchor block sizing basis missing
BOQ inclusion of appurtenances unclear
query_templates: Please provide the valve schedule with type, size, pressure rating, MOC, operation type, quantity, and location.
Please provide valve chamber dimensions, structural details, and standard drawings for pricing and construction.
Please confirm whether thrust blocks, anchor blocks, bends, tees, dismantling joints, and valve chambers are included in the BOQ or payable separately.

disciplines.discipline: Intake Works and Raw Water Pumping
pbq_triggers: hydrology or geotechnical data missing
screen details missing
pump head/discharge/standby/motor rating conflicts or missing
temporary works/cofferdam/dewatering responsibility unclear
approach bridge or intake GAD incomplete
query_templates: Please provide hydrological and geotechnical data for the intake location, including HFL/LWL, scour, river velocity, and bore logs.
Please provide intake screen details including number, duty/standby philosophy, opening size, MOC, cleaning arrangement, and disposal arrangement.
Please confirm raw water pump duty point, head, discharge, efficiency, motor rating, and standby configuration to be considered for bidding.

disciplines.discipline: Water Treatment Plant Process and Civil Units
pbq_triggers: raw water quality or seasonal variation data missing
design flow/peak flow conflicts
process unit sizing basis missing
chemical dosing or consumables responsibility unclear
sludge/backwash disposal scope unclear
civil/process equipment scope not linked to BOQ
query_templates: Please provide raw water quality data, seasonal variation, and design basis to enable process design and chemical consumption estimation.
Please confirm the design flow, peak hydraulic flow, and process unit sizing criteria to be adopted for the WTP.
Please clarify sludge handling, backwash recovery/disposal, and chemical dosing scope including BOQ/payment provisions.

pbq_triggers: pump head/discharge/motor rating missing or inconsistent
system head curve or surge analysis missing
duty/standby philosophy unclear
VFD/starter/control philosophy missing
equipment list not linked to BOQ
query_templates: Please provide pump data sheets including duty point, head, discharge, efficiency, motor rating, and duty/standby configuration.
Please provide system head curves and surge analysis/design basis for pump and pipeline sizing.
Please confirm whether VFDs/starters, panels, cranes/hoists, surge vessels, and accessories are included in the BOQ/payment schedule.

disciplines.discipline: Electrical, HT Line, Substation, and Power Supply
pbq_triggers: HT line route/length/source missing
utility approval and cost responsibility unclear
substation/transformer/metering scope unclear
electrical single-line details missing
BOQ/payment item for power supply works unclear
query_templates: Please provide HT power supply details including source point, voltage level, sanctioned load, route length, feeder bay/metering scope, and utility approval responsibility.
Please clarify substation and transformer scope including ratings, layout, protection, metering, earthing, and BOQ/payment provisions.
Please confirm whether statutory utility charges, approvals, deposits, and HT line works are in bidder scope or employer scope.

pbq_triggers: SCADA architecture or integration scope missing
instrument quantity/tag list/I/O list missing
software license/server scope unclear
communication protocol and network responsibility unclear
SCADA scope shown in specs but BOQ/payment item unclear
query_templates: Please provide SCADA architecture, PLC/RTU list, I/O list, tag list, communication protocol, software license scope, and integration requirements.
Please confirm instrument quantities, locations, approved makes, calibration requirements, and BOQ/payment provisions.
Please clarify bidder responsibility for integration with existing SCADA/IT systems, communication network, servers, cybersecurity, and licenses.

expected_data_fields: BOQ item reference for each scope element
pbq_triggers: scope item present in drawings/specs but absent from BOQ
quantity or length differs between BOQ and drawings
payment percentage or milestone unclear
all-inclusive scope unclear
variation/payment mechanism missing for uncertain scope
query_templates: Please confirm the BOQ item/payment mechanism for the specified scope item shown in the tender drawings/specifications.
Please reconcile the quantity/length difference between the BOQ and tender drawings/specifications and confirm the quantity to be considered for bidding.
Please clarify whether the item is included in the quoted lump-sum scope or payable separately as a BOQ/variation item.

pbq_triggers: O&M asset boundary unclear
existing asset baseline/condition assessment missing
trial run criteria or repeated trial cost unclear
consumables/power/chemical responsibility unclear
major maintenance and replacement responsibility unclear
O&M payment/escalation mechanism unclear
query_templates: Please confirm the exact assets included in O&M scope and the date from which O&M responsibility starts for each asset.
Please provide the existing asset condition assessment and handover/takeover protocol before O&M responsibility begins.
Please clarify responsibility and payment mechanism for power, chemicals, consumables, major repairs, replacements, sludge/waste disposal, and repeated trial runs.

disciplines.discipline: Site, Access, Utilities, Approvals, and Interfaces
pbq_triggers: land/ROW status unclear
utility shifting scope/cost/responsibility unclear
crossing permissions not provided
access/working space constraints unclear
shutdown/interface responsibility unclear
query_templates: Please provide land/ROW availability status, access constraints, and working-space details for the specified work location.
Please confirm responsibility, cost, and schedule impact treatment for utility shifting, road/rail/canal/forest crossings, and statutory approvals.
Please provide details of required shutdowns, interfaces with existing assets, and employer support for permissions.

pbq_triggers: GAD available but structural/detail drawings missing
dimensions/levels/geotechnical data missing
architectural/finishing/special coating scope unclear
foundation design assumptions unclear
BOQ/payment item unclear
query_templates: Please provide GAD, structural design basis, geotechnical data, dimensions, levels, and reinforcement/detail drawings for the civil structure.
Please confirm finishing, waterproofing, drainage, dewatering, and architectural scope along with BOQ/payment provisions.
Please clarify foundation design assumptions and responsibility for changes due to actual soil/subsurface conditions.

expected_data_fields: JV member share and lead member requirements
pbq_triggers: similar work definition is broad or inconsistent
lookback period or completion cut-off is unclear
parent/subsidiary/JV credential treatment is silent
subcontractor experience acceptance or cap is unclear
certificate format or issuing authority is not specified
bid capacity formula inputs are missing or ambiguous
query_templates: Please clarify the eligible bidder entity types, similar work definition, lookback period, and accepted completion evidence for pre-qualification.
Please confirm whether parent company, subsidiary, JV member, consortium member, or specialist subcontractor credentials are acceptable for meeting the stated eligibility criteria.
Please provide the required certificate formats, issuing authority requirements, bid capacity formula inputs, and registration/blacklisting declarations.

disciplines.discipline: Bid Submission, Forms, and Technical Packet
expected_data_fields: forms and schedules to be submitted
signing authority and power of attorney requirement
pbq_triggers: technical packet checklist is incomplete
online and hard-copy submission requirements conflict
form/annexure referenced but not provided
signing/notarization/attestation requirement is unclear
deviation statement or supporting document format is missing
bid security submission mode conflicts across sections
query_templates: Please provide the complete technical and financial bid submission checklist, including forms, schedules, certificates, undertakings, and supporting documents.
Please confirm online submission, hard-copy submission, signing authority, notarization/attestation, and bid security submission requirements.
Please provide the missing referenced forms/annexures and the required format for deviations or clarifications.

disciplines.discipline: Commercial Terms, Securities, Advances, and Price Adjustment
expected_data_fields: RA bill frequency and payment timeline
pbq_triggers: security percentage, amount, validity, or release milestone is unclear
advance payment eligibility or recovery is unclear
price adjustment formula, base date, or indices are missing
tax/duty inclusion and reimbursement treatment is unclear
payment milestone or RA bill timeline is not defined
bank guarantee format is referenced but not provided
query_templates: Please clarify bid security, performance security, retention, bank guarantee formats, validity periods, and release milestones.
Please confirm mobilization/secured advance eligibility, recovery mechanism, RA bill frequency, payment timeline, and deduction/withholding treatment.
Please provide the price adjustment formula, applicable indices, base date, and tax/GST/duty inclusion or reimbursement basis.

pbq_triggers: contract document hierarchy conflicts
liability cap or excluded damages are not defined
LD rate/cap or delay responsibility is unclear
termination/cure period and employer default remedies are unclear
force majeure, change in law, or EOT relief is incomplete
arbitration forum, venue, or rules are unclear
query_templates: Please confirm the applicable contract conditions, order of precedence, dispute resolution forum, arbitration rules, and venue.
Please clarify liability cap, excluded damages, indemnity scope, liquidated damages rate/cap, and delay responsibility.
Please confirm termination rights, cure periods, employer default remedies, force majeure relief, change in law treatment, and extension of time procedure.

pbq_triggers: insurance types are listed without limits or insured values
policy period across construction, defects liability, and O&M is unclear
deductible responsibility is unclear
additional insured or waiver of subrogation requirement is missing
professional indemnity or design liability cover applicability is unclear
query_templates: Please provide the required insurance policies, minimum insured values, policy periods, third-party liability limits, and proof submission timing.
Please confirm deductible responsibility, additional insured requirements, waiver of subrogation, and coverage during defects liability/O&M periods.
Please clarify whether professional indemnity or design liability insurance is required and provide the minimum cover amount and period.

pbq_triggers: standards are referenced but exact edition or hierarchy is unclear
FAT/SAT/performance test scope or duration is missing
quality plan, ITP, sampling, or laboratory requirements are unclear
acceptance/rejection/retest criteria are not defined
guarantee parameters or proof method are incomplete
query_templates: Please provide applicable standards/codes, quality assurance plan requirements, inspection and test plan requirements, and certificate formats.
Please clarify FAT, SAT, commissioning, performance guarantee test duration, sampling frequency, and acceptance/rejection/retest criteria.
Please confirm third-party inspection, laboratory approval, and records submission requirements.

disciplines.discipline: Existing Assets, Rehabilitation, and Takeover Baseline
pbq_triggers: existing asset inventory or condition report is missing
rehabilitation/replacement boundary is unclear
tie-in, shutdown, or interconnection details are incomplete
hidden defect risk allocation is not defined
dismantling/salvage and additional repair payment responsibility is unclear
query_templates: Please provide existing asset inventory, condition assessment reports, as-built drawings, and baseline performance data for takeover/rehabilitation scope.
Please clarify rehabilitation, replacement, refurbishment, tie-in, shutdown, and interconnection responsibilities and constraints.
Please confirm hidden defect risk allocation, dismantling/salvage responsibility, and payment mechanism for additional repairs found during execution.

expected_data_fields: temporary access and working platform requirement
pbq_triggers: temporary works responsibility or payment basis is unclear
traffic diversion, barricading, or public safety requirements are incomplete
dewatering and discharge permissions are unclear
temporary access, working platform, or temporary land is not defined
method statement approval process or lifting/launching constraints are missing
query_templates: Please clarify temporary works design responsibility, method statement approval process, and payment basis for temporary works.
Please provide requirements for traffic diversion, barricading, public safety, temporary access, working platforms, and restoration.
Please confirm dewatering scope, discharge permissions, temporary power/water responsibility, and lifting/launching constraints.

disciplines.discipline: Materials, MOC, Approved Makes, and Specification Conflicts
pbq_triggers: material grade/class/rating/thickness is missing or conflicting
approved makes list is missing, restrictive, or conflicts with specification
equivalent make approval process is unclear
coating/lining or test certificate requirement is incomplete
BOQ item and specification describe different materials or ratings
query_templates: Please clarify material of construction, grade/class/rating, minimum thickness, coating/lining, standards, and BOQ linkage for the specified item.
Please provide the approved makes list, equivalent make approval process, shop drawing approval requirements, and test certificate requirements.
Please confirm the order of precedence where BOQ, drawings, data sheets, and specifications conflict on material, make, rating, or thickness.

disciplines.discipline: Estimate Basis, Rate Analysis, and Cost Adequacy
expected_data_fields: tax and duty treatment in estimate
pbq_triggers: estimate/probable amount basis is not explained
rate analysis or schedule of rates reference is missing
CAPEX/OPEX or O&M price split is unclear
lump-sum versus item-rate risk allocation is unclear
quantity variation, provisional sum, or tax treatment is missing
price break-up format or payment item mapping is not provided
query_templates: Please provide the estimate basis, schedule of rates reference, rate analysis, and included/excluded cost components.
Please clarify CAPEX/OPEX split, O&M cost basis, lump-sum versus item-rate treatment, and quantity variation mechanism.
Please provide the required price break-up format, payment item mapping, tax/duty treatment, and provisional sum/contingency treatment.

element_detection_rules: Create a scope element when a topic, drawing, BOQ line, clause, or specification identifies a distinct asset, system, structure, equipment group, interface, or responsibility.
Attach all available references to the element: document name, page number, topic name, drawing number, BOQ item, clause number, section, and excerpt.
For each detected element, select the closest discipline checklist and evaluate expected_data_fields one by one.
Generate a PBQ for every expected field that is missing, contradictory, ambiguous, unreadable, not BOQ-linked, or not responsibility-linked.
If many fields are missing for one element, group closely related fields only when the employer can answer them together with one document/data sheet.

evidence_strength_values.direct: Tender evidence directly shows the ambiguity, conflict, missing field, or unclear responsibility.
evidence_strength_values.inferred: The scope element exists and the missing data is normally required, but absence is inferred from available evidence.
evidence_strength_values.absence_after_search: The system searched for the expected data and did not find it in indexed topics/evidence.
evidence_strength_values.weak: The evidence is incomplete or OCR/image extraction may be poor; keep row for human review if pricing/design relevance is high.

discipline_priority_order: Bid Submission, Forms, and Technical Packet
Commercial Terms, Securities, Advances, and Price Adjustment
Estimate Basis, Rate Analysis, and Cost Adequacy
Materials, MOC, Approved Makes, and Specification Conflicts
Water Treatment Plant Process and Civil Units
Electrical, HT Line, Substation, and Power Supply
Valves, Chambers, Thrust Blocks, and Appurtenances
Existing Assets, Rehabilitation, and Takeover Baseline
Site, Access, Utilities, Approvals, and Interfaces
Intake Works and Raw Water Pumping
quality_gate: Every row must name a missing/unclear data item.
Every row must identify a scope element or reference.
Every row must ask for a concrete employer action.
Every row must explain why the answer is needed.
Do not reject a row only because it is Medium priority if it affects pricing, quantity take-off, design, procurement, execution, O&M, approvals, or responsibility.
Do not invent project facts from this playbook. The playbook defines what to check; project evidence defines what to ask.
